title: Admixture and Curing Compound
intro: Ethios Domestic provides reliable, high-performance admixtures and curing compounds tailored for modern construction needs. These products enhance concrete strength, improve workability, control setting time, and ensure long-lasting durability. Sourced from trusted brands, our solutions help prevent cracking, reduce water loss, and deliver superior finish quality. With a focus on quality, consistency, and timely delivery, Ethios Domestic is your dependable partner in construction chemical trading.

products.name: Asian Paints
products.description: Asian Paints is a concrete admixture / curing solution from Ethios that improves strength, workability, and durability. Contact our technical team for the data sheet and recommended dosage.
